# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Please follow the rules and architecture specifications documented in [ai.md](file:///Users/maulik/Documents/GitHub/course-viewer/ai.md) when working on this codebase.

## Quick Summary:
- **Backend**: Express.js server (runs on port 3005). See `server.js`.
- **Frontend**: Vanilla SPA (HTML5, CSS, and JS) inside the `public/` directory.
- **Database**: Local JSON file `db.json`.
- **Coding Conventions**: Do not remove comments, use Vanilla CSS styling following the existing glassmorphic theme, and ensure `saveDb()` is called when updating progress.
